mechanism_narrative: A declining FEDFUNDS rate lowers discount rates and supports equity multiples, so a 3-month downtrend in policy rates predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward SPX returns are not positive in at least 55% of instances when FEDFUNDS falls for 3 consecutive months, or if rolling 2-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE above its recent level marks weakening household income and demand, which should pressure earnings expectations and produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns more than 60% of the time, or if the signal’s 1-year rolling hit rate falls below 45%.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS and PAYEMS both improve together, higher sales and payroll growth confirm stronger nominal demand and support positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint-signal portfolio fails to outperform when both RSAFS and PAYEMS are above their 3-month moving averages, or if the 5-day forward return sign is not positive in a majority of joint-expansion instances.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in INDPRO indicates stronger real output and factory activity, which should lift cyclical earnings expectations and generate positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day forward SPX returns are not higher after positive 3-month INDPRO trends than after flat or negative trends, or if rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: An inflation surge above the policy rate implies tighter real financial conditions and higher odds of future restraint, which should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if periods with CPI inflation exceeding FEDFUNDS by more than 2.0pp do not show negative average 20-day SPX returns, or if the interaction signal has no incremental predictive power over CPIAUCSL alone.

mechanism_narrative: A low and stable UNRATE together with rising PAYEMS signals resilient labor income and supports risk-taking, so the combination predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE < 4.5% and PAYEMS rises for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances fail to deliver positive 60-day forward SPX returns more than 50% of the time, or if the joint condition does not outperform either proxy used alone.

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in HOUST after a prior slowdown signals reaccelerating housing demand and broader cyclical activity, which should translate into positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST rebound episodes are followed by negative or flat 20-day SPX returns more often than positive returns, or if the signal’s out-of-sample hit rate stays below 52%.

mechanism_narrative: In a late-cycle slowdown, weak GDPC1 growth paired with falling RSAFS signals fading final demand and deteriorating earnings breadth, which should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if weak-GDPC1 / weak-RSAFS regimes do not coincide with below-median 60-day SPX returns, or if the joint signal loses significance after controlling for either series alone.
